statement: In every magma, Equation 3907 (`x * x = (y * (z * z)) * z`) implies Equation 3863 (`x * x = (x * (x * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0540
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op (op y (op z z)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op (op x (op x x)) y)
